name: Lemon Delight Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Or use 2 8-ounce containers of Philadelphia soft cream cheese.
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix Graham Cracker Cereal and Sugar in a bowl.
3. Add melted Margarine and mix well.
4. Stir in Cold Water until the mixture is damp but not wet.
5. Sprinkle over bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
6. Crush envelope Gelatin with Cold Water and stir until dissolved.
7. Mix in Lemon Juice, Sugar, and Grated Lemon Peel.
8. Pour into prepared crust.
9. Bake for 40-45 minutes or until set but slightly wobbly.
10. Cool completely before serving.
11. Refrigerate at least 4 hours before serving to allow the filling to firm up.
